name: Chocolate Pistachio Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cake mix, pistachio pudding, orange juice, oil, eggs, and almond extract in a bowl. Mix at medium speed for 3 minutes.
2. Pour 2/3 of the batter into a greased bundt pan.
3. Add the remaining chocolate syrup to the pan.
4. Bake for 50-60 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Top with your favorite glaze.
For Chocolate-Butterscotch Bundt Cake:
1. Use butterscotch pudding instead of pistachio pudding.
2. Substitute water for orange juice.
3. Omit the almond extract.
